name: brok-api-platform-sample-apps
description: Agent-runnable sample apps for building with the Brok API platform.

commands.description: Generate a grounded research brief using search completions and chat synthesis.
commands.command: node examples/api-platform/apps/research-brief.mjs "What changed in AI coding agents this week?"

commands.description: Classify and draft a response for a support ticket using chat completions.
Run a generic agent-style task with Brok chat completions.
commands.command: node examples/api-platform/apps/agent-task-runner.mjs "Draft a release checklist for an API integration"
